body.en:
6 wins and 6 losses mark the trading week so far for crypto-ace, the BitPredictable Trading Agent, with a cumulative return of -2.74% and a Sharpe ratio of -8.24. This balanced performance comes as the AI forecast suggests flat movement across the board, with [bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) predicted to remain steady at -0.35% and a confidence level of 66%.

## What Changed
Since Monday, the market has seen some notable movements, particularly with the news of a dormant [bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) wallet from the 2017 peak moving $383 million, as reported by [CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/16/a-bitcoin-wallet-dormant-since-the-2017-peak-just-moved-usd383-million). Additionally, [ethereum](/coins/ethereum) has been outrunning [bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) as ETF money returns, largely driven by BlackRock's fund. These developments have not significantly altered the AI's forecast, which still points to a generally flat market, with [solana](/coins/solana) predicted to decline by -1.58% and a high confidence level of 88%.

## Trading Agent Update
The crypto-ace agent has held firm in its risk management, despite mixed signals from the market. With 20 total trades and a win rate of 35%, the agent's performance reflects the challenging market conditions. As the week unfolds, it will be crucial to monitor how the agent adapts to potential shifts in the market, particularly in response to significant news events, such as the U.S. Senate's unanimous opposition to clemency for FTX founder Sam Bankman-Fried, as reported by [CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/policy/2026/07/16/u-s-senate-unanimously-opposes-clemency-for-ftx-founder-sam-bankman-fried).
This information is for informational purposes only and should not be considered as investment advice.

## In the News

Live updates: ZachXBT calls hardware wallets complete garbage; BTC steady after Korea rate hike ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/16/live-updates-zachxbt-calls-hardware-wallets-complete-garbage-btc-steady-near-usd65-000))

Ether outruns bitcoin as ETF money returns, almost all of from BlackRock's fund ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/16/ether-outruns-bitcoin-as-etf-money-returns-almost-all-of-from-blackrock-s-fund))

Two groups of bitcoin investors sell on the rise as U.S. inflation lifts prices to nearly $65,000 ([CoinDesk](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/16/two-groups-of-bitcoin-investors-sell-on-the-rise-as-inflation-lifts-prices-to-nearly-usd65-000))
body.ja:
月曜の週次記事以降に注目すべき出来事がいくつか発生しました。特に、CoinDeskの記事「[A bitcoin wallet dormant since the 2017 peak just moved $383 million](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/16/a-bitcoin-wallet-dormant-since-the-2017-peak-just-moved-usd383-million)」が注目を集めています。このような大口の動きは市場に大きな影響を与える可能性があります。

## 変化のポイント
BitPredictableのLSTMモデルによると、[ethereum](/coins/ethereum) の予測は、+0.02%と予測されており、信頼度は21%です。一方、[solana](/coins/solana) の予測は、-1.58%と予測されており、信頼度は88%です。また、CoinDeskの記事「[Ether outruns bitcoin as ETF money returns, almost all of from BlackRock's fund](https://www.coindesk.com/markets/2026/07/16/ether-outruns-bitcoin-as-etf-money-returns-almost-all-of-from-blackrock-s-fund)」は、エクスチェンジ・トレーデッド・ファンド（ETF）への投資が回復し、[bitcoin](/coins/bitcoin) と比較して[ethereum](/coins/ethereum) の相対的な強さを示しています。

## トレードエージェントの状況
Trading Agent (crypto-ace) の状況を見ると、累積リターンは -2.74% で、勝率は 35% です。合計 20 のトレードが行われ、シャープレシオは -8.24 です。この週のトレードでは、6 勝 6 敗と拮抗しています。エージェントのノートによると、バランスの取れた週で、12 のトレードが行われ、混合信号が出ましたが、リスク管理が堅固に維持されました。

投資助言ではありません
